title: Raymond James (RJF) Stock Down 2.6% on Q3 Earnings Miss
text: Subdued IB and trading performance, higher provisions and a rise in expenses hurt Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q3 earnings.

title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kristina Waugh - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Paul Reilly - Chair and CEO Paul Shoukry - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Kyle Voigt - KBW Alexander Blostein - Goldman Sachs Brennan Hawken - UBS James Mitchell - Seaport Global Michael Cyprys - Morgan Stanley Devin Ryan - JMP Securities Kristina Waugh Good evening everyone, and thank you for joining us. title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Lags Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.85 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.10 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.61 per share a year ago.

title: Raymond James Financial Reports Third Quarter of Fiscal 2023 Results
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla – Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) today reported record net revenues of $2.91 billion and net income available to common shareholders of $369 million, or $1.71 per diluted share, for the fiscal third quarter ended June 30, 2023. Excluding $40 million of expenses related to acquisitions, quarterly adjusted net income available to common shareholders was $399 million (3) , or $1.85 per diluted share (3) .

title: What's in the Card for Raymond James (RJF) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Weakness in IB and trading operations and higher deposit costs are expected to have hurt Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q3 earnings. A rise in NII on modest loan demand might have offered support.

title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: ReGen III Adds Raymond James & Associates, Inc. As Co-Advisor
text: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - July 18, 2023) - ReGen III Corp. (TSXV: GIII) (OTCQB: ISRJF) (FSE: PN4) ("ReGen III" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that further to the Company's press releases dated February 24, March 13 and June 29, 2023, it has entered into a co-advisory agreement with Raymond James & Associates, Inc. ("Raymond James"), a subsidiary of Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF), and National Bank Financial Inc. ("NBF"). As further detailed below, under the co-advisory agreement, Raymond James will work in conjunction with NBF to assist the Company in identifying and pursuing project-level acquisition opportunities and may provide other financial advisory services in connection with such acquisitions as requested by the Company, with the ultimate goal of increasing ReGen III's market share, accelerating first revenues, and generating economies of scale.

title: Massachusetts fines Raymond James for charging ‘unreasonably high fees'
text: William F. Galvin, the Secretary of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, ordered Raymond James Financial Services, Inc. RJF, +0.71% to return $8.25 million plus interest to customers who were charged “unreasonably high fees” as part of a settlement, according to a Tuesday statement. He also ordered Raymond James to pay $4.2 million in fines and penalties to the six states involved in the probe of the financial firm.
